examples.title: Bus Arbitration Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode algorithm for bus arbitration, demonstrating how devices request access to the bus and how conflicts are resolved.
examples.code:
IF device_request = TRUE THEN
  IF bus_available = TRUE THEN
    grant_access(device)
  ELSE
    wait_for_bus(device)
ENDIF
examples.explanation: This algorithm demonstrates how devices request access to the bus and how conflicts are resolved.
